allow:
Bash(# .env.example is ignored by the global gitignore \(the .* pattern\), move it manually
mv .env.example backend/.env.example && git add -f backend/.env.example
git status --short)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; reviews=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''[{r[""state""]}] {r[""body""][:500]}''''\) for r in reviews if r[''''body'''']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d[''''title'''']\); print\(''''Branch:'''', d[''''headRefName'''']\)")

hooks.prompt: A new session has started in the llm-council project. Schedule the hourly frontend sync cron job using CronCreate with cron '47 * * * *' and the following prompt (copy it exactly): ---PROMPT START--- You are the backend Claude for the llm-council repository. Perform a frontend sync check. First, read /home/val/wrk/projects/llm-council/llm-council/.env and extract AGA2AGA_AGENT_NAME (your agent id) and AGA2AGA_API_KEY (your api_key). Gateway: http://localhost:3001. Steps: 1. Read /home/val/.claude/projects/-home-val-wrk-projects-llm-council-llm-council/memory/project_frontend_sync.md and note what changed last time. 2. Run: git -C /home/val/wrk/projects/llm-council/llm-council-frontend log --oneline -10 3. Run: gh issue list --repo valpere/llm-council-frontend --state open --json number,title -q '.[] | "#\(.number) \(.title)"' 4. Check inbox via aga2aga MCP: call receive_message with agent and api_key from .env. If a message arrives (from != ''), read and act on it. 5. Compare git log and issues against memory. Update /home/val/.claude/projects/-home-val-wrk-projects-llm-council-llm-council/memory/project_frontend_sync.md if anything changed. 6. If you have something genuinely useful to tell the frontend, send it via aga2aga MCP: call send_message with agent and api_key from .env, to='llm-council-frontend', and a concise body. Only send if genuinely useful. Be concise. ---PROMPT END--- Do this silently without announcing it.
